name: Floor Lamp Maroon - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Light up your home in a sleek and elegant style with the Floor Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This maroon floor lamp features an empire-shape shade with whipstitch detailing that joins the round base with a sleek rod. It's made of metal and has a one-way turn knob rotary switch for easy illumination. Place it in your living room, reading nook, or any other area for a warm glow of light.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
